description: Decolar is the Brazilian brand of Despegar, a Latin American online travel company. Its B2B platform lets partners integrate hotel, flight, activity, booking, after-sales, and related travel services.
summary: decolar.com maps to Despegar’s B2B integration platform, which exposes a REST API suite at https://api.despegar.com/v3 secured by an API key, plus two MCP endpoints for flights and hotels secured with OAuth 2.0 client-credentials bearer tokens.
